_meta.description: Machine-readable index of every module in the NCE Sync (Tables) Frappe app. Read this file FIRST before exploring the codebase — it tells you exactly where to look for any given concern.
_meta.usage: Find the module whose 'purpose' matches your task, then read only that file and its 'depends_on' entries.

architecture.overview: NCE Sync (app_title: Tables) synchronises WordPress database tables to Frappe custom doctypes. It mirrors WordPress table schemas as Frappe doctypes, then syncs data bidirectionally. Also provides a Table Links page for managing cross-table relationships. Used as a dependency by NCE Events.
architecture.data_flow: WordPress MySQL → schema_mirror.py (introspect + create/update Frappe doctype) → data_sync.py (pull WP rows → upsert Frappe records) | Frappe doc events → live_sync.py / reverse_sync.py → push back to WordPress MySQL
key_patterns: WP_Tables doctype is the central config record per synced table (connection, column mapping, matching keys, field overrides)
schema_mirror.py introspects WP table schema and creates/updates Frappe custom doctype
data_sync.py does incremental sync using modified timestamp cutoff
live_sync.py hooks into Frappe doc events to push changes back to WP in real time
reverse_sync.py handles full Frappe-to-WP push with temp name management
API Connector stores credentials (base_url, auth_pattern, credential_config JSON)

nce_sync/hooks.py.purpose: App config: metadata, CSS/JS includes, apps screen registration (title: Tables, route: /app/tables)

nce_sync/api.py.purpose: Whitelisted page-level endpoints: toggle auto-sync, get table links grid, apply table link changes, export doctype to Excel

nce_sync/overrides.py.purpose: Frappe lifecycle override hooks injected via hooks.py

nce_sync/utils/schema_mirror.py.purpose: WordPress schema introspection and Frappe doctype mirroring: connect to WP MySQL, discover tables/views, map MariaDB types to Frappe types, create or update Frappe custom doctype with matching field configuration

nce_sync/utils/data_sync.py.purpose: WP-to-Frappe incremental data sync: fetch changed rows since last sync timestamp, upsert Frappe records, publish progress events

nce_sync/utils/live_sync.py.purpose: Real-time Frappe-to-WP sync triggered by doc events: on_record_change hook pushes modified Frappe records back to WordPress immediately

nce_sync/utils/reverse_sync.py.purpose: Full Frappe-to-WP bulk sync: inserts new records and updates existing ones in WP, handles temp name assignment for new Frappe records before WP ID is known

nce_sync/utils/workspace_utils.py.purpose: Frappe Workspace creation/management utilities for NCE Sync

nce_sync/nce_sync/doctype/wp_tables/.purpose: Central config per synced WordPress table: WP connection, table name, Frappe doctype name, column mapping, matching keys, field overrides, timestamp fields, auto-sync flag

nce_sync/nce_sync/doctype/wordpress_conn.purpose: WordPress MySQL connection config: host, port, database, user, password. Test connection button in form.

nce_sync/nce_sync/doctype/api_connector/.purpose: External API connector config: base_url, auth_pattern, credential_config (JSON). Used by NCE Events for credentials.py lookup.

nce_sync/nce_sync/doctype/api_connector_.purpose: Individual API endpoint definition linked to an API Connector

nce_sync/nce_sync/doctype/sync_manager/.purpose: Batch sync manager — trigger and monitor sync across multiple WP Tables

nce_sync/nce_sync/doctype/sync_log/.purpose: Log of each sync run: table, rows processed, errors, status

nce_sync/nce_sync/page/nce_sync/.purpose: Main NCE Sync dashboard page — table list, sync triggers, status display

nce_sync/nce_sync/page/table_links/.purpose: Table Links page — visual grid for managing cross-table relationships (which WP tables are linked to which Frappe doctypes)

nce_sync/public/js/list_auto_size.js.purpose: Global JS — auto-sizes list view columns for better readability
